sourcesContent:
// Mock models data for POC
export const models = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: 'Aisha Sharma',
    age: 23,
    height: "5'9\"",
    specialty: 'Runway & Editorial',
    location: 'Mumbai',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1531746020798-e6953c6e8e04?w=400&q=80',
    bio: 'Aisha has walked for top designers at Lakme Fashion Week and has graced the covers of Vogue India and Elle.',
    stats: { bust: '34"', waist: '24"', hips: '35"', shoes: '7' },
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: 'Priya Mehta',
    age: 25,
    height: "5'10\"",
    specialty: 'Bridal & Commercial',
    location: 'Delhi',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1524504388940-b1c1722653e1?w=400&q=80',
    bio: 'Priya specializes in bridal couture modeling and has appeared in numerous national and international campaigns.',
    stats: { bust: '33"', waist: '23"', hips: '34"', shoes: '7.5' },
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: 'Kavya Nair',
    age: 21,
    height: "5'8\"",
    specialty: 'Street & Ethnic',
    location: 'Bangalore',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1502823403499-6ccfcf4fb453?w=400&q=80',
    bio: 'Kavya brings energy and versatility to every show, excelling in both contemporary street and traditional ethnic fashion.',
    stats: { bust: '32"', waist: '24"', hips: '34"', shoes: '6.5' },
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: 'Riya Kapoor',
    age: 26,
    height: "5'11\"",
    specialty: 'Luxury & Couture',
    location: 'Mumbai',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1488716820095-cbe80883c496?w=400&q=80',
    bio: 'Riya has an extensive portfolio with luxury brands globally and is known for her commanding presence on the runway.',
    stats: { bust: '34"', waist: '25"', hips: '35"', shoes: '8' },
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: 'Sneha Joshi',
    age: 22,
    height: "5'9\"",
    specialty: 'Editorial & Runway',
    location: 'Chennai',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1534528741775-53994a69daeb?w=400&q=80',
    bio: 'Sneha is a rising star whose editorial work has been featured in Harper\'s Bazaar and Femina, with multiple runway credits.',
    stats: { bust: '33"', waist: '23"', hips: '34"', shoes: '7' },
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: 'Meera Reddy',
    age: 24,
    height: "5'8\"",
    specialty: 'Commercial & Print',
    location: 'Hyderabad',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1484399172022-72a90b12e3c1?w=400&q=80',
    bio: 'Meera is a versatile commercial model with over 50 print campaigns and several prominent TV commercial appearances.',
    stats: { bust: '33"', waist: '24"', hips: '35"', shoes: '6.5' },
  },
];
